observed_overlap: Can relate two discourse-sized constituents in a noncanonical order.
decisive_difference: Does not require a medial sentence particle, a post-particle remnant, syntactic dependency diagnostics, or focused pre-particle material.

current_role: Scopes one or more sentence-final particles over a complete statement
decisive_difference: DFC has clause-related overt material after the particle; the current frame is explicitly final-particle scoped.

current_role: Restrictive focus over a visible scalar or quantity host
observed_overlap: Shares the broad notion of focus and particle marking.
decisive_difference: Current frame is limited to restrictive 得 … 啫/咋 profiles, not clause-level dislocation or sentence-particle position.

observed_overlap: Both can place overt discourse/stance material inside a larger clause string.
decisive_difference: Stance-medial placement does not entail post-particle remnant dependency or DFC focus interpretation.

observed_overlap: Can yield material after an apparent clause boundary or particle.
decisive_difference: Cheung's diagnostics target syntactic connection; afterthought/repair may be intonationally independent and requires audio/context evidence.
